g.text: RTX 5090 long-context throughput: Qwopus Q5 stays usable to 256k
Qwopus3.6-27B-Coder-MTP Q5_K_M - llama.cpp b9761 - ctx=256k - MTP n=2 - 1024 generated tokens
Bars show average completion throughput. Rails show measured min/max across runs.
Source: results/rtx-5090 CSVs, 2026-06-22. Prompt style: BookContext. Run 1 includes prefill overhead except the separately warmed 256k run.
